NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​UIFactory
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUIFactory
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​UIFactory

UI factory for Avalonia UI interface

Variables
_applicationIcon
protected WindowIcon? _applicationIcon

Icon used on various windows shown by NetSparkleUpdater

_iconBitmap
private Bitmap? _iconBitmap
Functions
UIFactory
public UIFactory()

Create a new UIFactory for Avalonia applications

UIFactory
public UIFactory(
WindowIcon 
applicationIcon,
string 
releaseNotesSeparatorTemplate
 = 
"",
string 
releaseNotesHeadAddition
 = 
""
)

Create a new UIFactory for Avalonia applications

Parameters
applicationIcon
WindowIcon

Icon to show in various windows

releaseNotesSeparatorTemplate
string

HTML template to put between release notes for different versions. Defaults to "".

releaseNotesHeadAddition
string

Additional HTML to add to the head element of the release notes html

Properties
HideReleaseNotes
public bool HideReleaseNotes {
get;
set
}
HideSkipButton
public bool HideSkipButton {
get;
set
}
HideRemindMeLaterButton
public bool HideRemindMeLaterButton {
get;
set
}
ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate
public string? ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate {
get;
set
}
AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML
public string? AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML {
get;
set
}
UseStaticUpdateWindowBackgroundColor
public bool UseStaticUpdateWindowBackgroundColor {
get;
set
}

Whether or not a hardcoded window background color is set on the updates window.  Defaults to true.

UpdateWindowGridBackgroundBrush
public IBrush UpdateWindowGridBackgroundBrush {
get;
set
}

Brush for the background of the main grid on the update (change log) window

ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat
public string ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat {
get;
set
}

The DateTime.ToString() format used when formatting dates to show in the release notes header. NetSparkle is not responsible for what happens if you send a bad format! :)

ReleaseNotesGrabberOverride
public ReleaseNotesGrabber? ReleaseNotesGrabberOverride {
get;
set
}

Easily set / override the ReleaseNotesGrabber used by the UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel.  Note that this will NOT automatically use the UIFactory ReleaseNotesHTMLTemplate, AdditionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML, and ReleaseNotesDateTimeFormat that you may have set on the UIFactory - you must set these on this manual override yourself!

Use this if you want to easily override the ReleaseNotesGrabber with your own subclass. Note that if you want the notes to be styled the same as default, you can use UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel.GetDefaultReleaseNotesTemplate and UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel.GetDefaultAdditionalHeaderHTML and pass those in to your ReleaseNotesGrabber subclass.

Delegates
WindowHandler
public delegate void WindowHandler(
Window 
window,
UIFactory 
factory
)

A delegate for handling windows that are created by a UIFactory

Parameters
window
Window

Window that has been created and initialized (with view model, if applicable)

factory
UIFactory

UIFactory that created the given Window

Properties
ProcessWindowAfterInit
public WindowHandler? ProcessWindowAfterInit {
get;
set
}

Set this property to manually do any other setup on a Window after it has been created by the UIFactory.  Can be used to tweak view models, change styles on the Window, etc.
